Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The WrapMode enumeration defines how texture coordinates outside the normal range are mapped before sampling. It is configured with SetTextureWrapMode.

EnumMemberList.EnumMemberListEntry: Clamps coordinates to the nearest edge texel, so samples outside the texture use the edge value.
Repeats the texture pattern for coordinates outside the normal range.
Repeats the texture pattern while mirroring every second repetition.
